title: The Five Elders Descend
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Marines, Jinbe, Unknown person #5, Kizaru, Nami as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They didn't come here to wage war!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They came to help us get GJTA here! We gotta hurry and finish our prep!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: RING - Ring!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ahhh! Hhhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gatcha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Nami-San?! It's Brook!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Brook! Where are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Close!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Very close... but we won't be able to stop for tea.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We need to stop!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we fly off the edge, we'll be fried by the barrier!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hello, this is Lluith!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This numbskull really is brainless!! We can't afford to dilly-dally, so pay attention!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Sounds like they're getting fired up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to be ready to leave at a moment's notice!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This isn't the time to be picking fights...

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: ...zoro.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PANT_ PANT_ YOU'RE PRETTY TOUGH. BUT I'M IN A HURRY: IT'S TIME TO WRAP THIS UP!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only the winner gets to talk like that, RORDOA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your grew's waiting for you, right?! You're just a burden at this point.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those fools will never make it if they can't cut off the arm to save the body!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Giving up now would be doing them a favor! Waiting for a corpse is pointless, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It almost sounds like you think you're the one in control of this fight... Rob Lucch!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Damage report?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: UWAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Roughly thirty of our small to medium sized ships have been sunk!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: With no signs of it stopping!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pull back all smaller vessels and lead with the battleships!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We can't afford to leave an opening!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: BA-BANG!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, sir...

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral Red King!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is a pitiful sight...

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
